name: skillos
description: Wires @skillos/sdk into skill-game projects (puzzle, word, match, retro arcade, speedrun, rhythm, trivia, typing, math) for permissionless tournaments, on-chain leaderboards, and sponsor-funded prize pools on Base Sepolia. Includes per-game builder-code map, mandatory post-merge live attribution verification (X10 lesson), and structured error handling (X9 lesson). Phase 1 testnet only.

when_to_invoke: User mentions tournament, leaderboard, score submission, or prize pool in a game context
User is building a web-based skill game (puzzle, word, match, retro arcade, speedrun, rhythm, trivia, typing, math)
User asks how to add scoring or high scores to their game
User wants on-chain verifiable, replay-attested gameplay
User wants permissionless sponsor-funded prize pools
User is integrating Base Account / Builder Code revenue share into a skill-game project
when_NOT_to_invoke: Real-time multiplayer (FPS, MOBA, fighting, racing) — skill-luck balance is wrong
Single-player narrative games — no competitive layer
Card-based gambling (poker, blackjack, slots) — out of scope (legal exposure exponential)
Mainnet production deployments — Phase 1 testnet only currently

filesystem_read.purpose: Read game source, package.json, tsconfig.json to identify integration points

filesystem_write.purpose: Scaffold SkillOSProvider wrapper, score-submit boilerplate, builder-code wiring helper
filesystem_write.scope: Project source tree (app/, src/, components/) only — never .env, never system files, never outside repo root

shell_execution.purpose: npm install, npm run dev, npm test, cast call (read-only), curl GET, git status/diff
shell_execution.scope: Whitelisted commands only; never cast send, never rm -rf, never git push without explicit user approval

network_access.purpose: Base Sepolia RPC, Blockscout, BaseScan, api.skillos.network, api.base.dev (builder-code lookup)
network_access.scope: Read-only HTTP GET / RPC eth_call to whitelisted hosts only
